title: Medixum AI — Clinic FAQ Schema
description: Structured, per-clinic FAQ knowledge base. One document per clinic. Injected into the receptionist prompt as the clinic knowledge block. Adding or editing FAQs never requires a code change.

clinic_id.description: Stable unique id for the clinic (matches clinics.id in Supabase).

version.description: Increment on every edit; used for cache invalidation of the injected knowledge block.

locale.description: Language of these FAQ answers. MVP: 'en'. Future: 'ta', 'ta-en' (Tanglish).

id.description: Stable id for the FAQ entry, e.g. 'consultation_fee'.

answer.description: The approved answer. Must be short and factual. The receptionist paraphrases this warmly but must not contradict it or invent beyond it.

requires_staff.description: If true, the receptionist defers to staff instead of answering directly (e.g. sensitive billing questions).

faqs.question: What are your clinic timings?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, 10 AM to 8 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: Where is the clinic located?
faqs.answer: We are at 1st Floor, Anna Nagar Main Road, Madurai. Google Maps link is shared on request.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, two-wheeler and car parking are available in front of the clinic.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Most cosmetic and dermatology consultations are self-pay. For specific insurance queries, our staff will assist you.

faqs.question: Who are the doctors?
faqs.answer: Consultations are with Dr. Meera, our consultant dermatologist. Cosmetology procedures are performed under her supervision.

faqs.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, UPI, and cards.

faqs.question: Is there a follow-up charge?
faqs.answer: A follow-up within 7 days of consultation is complimentary.

faqs.question: How do I cancel an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can let us know here and our staff will cancel it for you.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule my appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes, share your preferred new day and time and we'll update your request.
